Headquartered at Menara BCA, Grand Indonesia, Jakarta, the bank employs around 27,937 individuals. As of March 6, 2026, BBCA's last closing price was IDR 7,000, with its 52-week price range varying from IDR 6,375 to IDR 9,800. The bank is included in several indices, such as the FTSE and LQ45.

It operates primarily in the banking sector, specifically focused on providing financial services. As of the latest update, BBRI has a market capitalization of approximately IDR 550.66 trillion, ranking it 4th in the market.

The bank, headquartered at Gedung BRI I, Jl. Jenderal Sudirman Kav. 44-46, Jakarta, employs around 59,495 individuals. Its last recorded share price was IDR 3,670, posting a minor decrease recently. The company has a notable ESG score of 19.45.

BBRI is part of multiple indices, including IDX30, LQ45, and KOMPAS100, and is recognized for its strong dividend yield and significant trading volume. Investors can find more information on its website: [www.bri.co.id](http://www.bri.co.id). For inquiries, they can reach out via phone at 021 - 575 1966 or email at humas@bri.co.id.
